# Newton's Second Law graph

## Short Teaching Summary
Newton's Second Law graph: A graph plotting resultant force (F) on the y-axis against acceleration (a) on the x-axis should be a straight line passing through the origin. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
